title: T-019 — POST /api/scheduler/forecasts/upload (manual CSV)
prompt:
# T-019 — POST /api/scheduler/forecasts/upload (manual CSV)

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.2 forecasts/upload, §7.3 FR-07-E3-001..003, §8.3 SLO
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement multipart/form-data upload of forecast CSV (product_id, week_iso, qty_kg) → INSERTs into demand_forecasts with source='manual' + supersession of any existing 'manual' row for same (product, week).

## Implementation contract
1. Route `apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/forecasts/upload/route.ts`: POST multipart accepts .csv up to 5MB, ≤10 000 rows.
2. Server-side parse via Papa.parse-style stream; validate each row { product_id (UUID), week_iso (YYYY-Www), qty_kg (NUMERIC ≥ 0) }.
3. For each valid row: in transaction, UPDATE existing manual row SET superseded_at=now() WHERE (tenant, product, week, source='manual') AND superseded_at IS NULL; INSERT new row.
4. Returns 200 with { inserted_count, errors: [{row_index, message}] }; SLO: 1k rows < 3s P95.

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/forecasts/upload/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/forecast-csv-parser.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/forecasts/upload/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a valid CSV with 100 rows + Planner role, when POST runs, then 100 demand_forecasts rows inserted (source='manual'), inserted_count=100, errors=[]
2. Given a CSV with an invalid week_iso ('2026-W99'), when POST runs, then that row excluded, errors[] includes the row index, valid rows still inserted
3. Given an existing manual row for (product P, week W), when POST inserts (P, W) again, then existing row gets superseded_at=now() and new row created (supersession audit trail)

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/route.test.ts covering bulk insert + invalid row partial-success + supersession
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/forecasts/upload'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip CSV size/row limits (5MB / 10k rows enforced server-side)
- Do not delete the previous manual forecast (use supersession, not DELETE — audit trail)
- Do not bypass Planner role guard

pipeline_inputs.description: Multipart CSV upload endpoint with row-level validation, supersession semantics, partial-success response.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server-side stream parsing rejects oversize files (5MB / 10k rows). Per-row Zod validation. Supersession in transaction (UPDATE existing manual + INSERT new). Returns inserted_count + per-row errors. SLO: 1k rows < 3s P95.
out_of_scope: Do not implement Prophet inference here (T-061)
Do not implement forecast UI here (T-042)
Do not consume forecast outbox event (04-PLAN owns)

Given a CSV with invalid week_iso, when POST runs, then row excluded, errors[] entry returned, valid rows still inserted
Given an existing manual row for (product P, week W), when POST inserts (P, W) again, then existing row's superseded_at=now() and a new row is inserted
test_strategy: RED: write __tests__/route.test.ts covering bulk insert + invalid row partial-success + supersession audit
risk_red_lines: Do not skip 5MB/10k row size limits
Do not DELETE the previous manual forecast (use supersession)
Do not bypass Planner role guard
